subject: [PATCH pynfs v3 07/26] server41tests: test rename triggers dir delegation recall

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch adds a test to the server41tests suite in the pynfs project. The test verifies that when a file is renamed from one client while another client holds a directory delegation for the parent directory, the server issues a CB_RECALL operation to recall the delegation. This ensures that the server properly handles delegation recalls triggered by rename operations.
